The Woods Water Testing Green Fair About Us News Events Join Us Contact

Join Us

Become a member of FGVW and help protect Gledhow Valley Woods for future generations. Membership starts at just £5 per year.

Become a member

FGVW membership supports our conservation work, citizen science, and community events. Membership fees are subject to change.

£5
Annual membership
Per person, per year
£50
Lifetime membership
A one-off payment for life

Membership fees are subject to change. Please check this page for current rates before joining.

⚠ PAYMENT PROVIDER TBC

Online payment will be handled here. The payment provider integration (Stripe / PayPal / GoCardless) is to be confirmed and will be added to this form. Until payment is integrated, please contact us to arrange membership by bank transfer or cheque.

Stay in touch

Sign up to our mailing list to receive occasional updates about FGVW news, conservation work, events, and the Green Fair. You don't need to be a member to subscribe.

MAILERLITE INTEGRATION PLACEHOLDER

Replace this block with the MailerLite embedded form or API integration. The form fields above (name, email, consent checkbox) should be connected to MailerLite's API or replaced with MailerLite's own embed code.

See our Privacy Policy for details on how we handle your data.

Friends of Gledhow Valley Woods is a registered charity protecting and enhancing Gledhow Valley Woods in north Leeds since 1996.

Registered Charity No. 1169599
